## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `make check-all` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] Schema changes follow additive-only discipline (no rename/retype/remove of existing fields without a major version bump)
